capstones.title: Master the residue theorem
capstones.blurb: Integrate f around a closed contour by summing residues at its poles. The algorithmic heart of complex analysis.

capstones.title: Prove the Riemann mapping theorem
capstones.blurb: Every simply connected proper open U ⊂ C is conformally the disk. Needs Schwarz, Möbius, Montel.

capstones.title: Complex-analytic proof of the FTA
capstones.blurb: Liouville gives the one-page proof: a bounded entire function is constant.

capstones.title: Locate zeros with Rouché
capstones.blurb: Count zeros of holomorphic functions by perturbation. Foundation for the argument-principle toolkit.
